content: Self-Refine’s single-model iterative feedback loop can be augmented by multi-perspective inconsistency detection from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement framework that retains Self-Refine’s zero-training advantage while fixing its blind spot of missing systematic errors that a single perspective cannot recognize. This hybrid framework would enable LLMs to self-improve code or reasoning outputs without extra training data, external test cases, or human labels, outperforming either approach alone on open-ended generation tasks.
